title: JLBetterFont
description: It replaces the default Minecraft font with a smoother and more readable
body:
JLBetter Font

is a clean and improved Minecraft font designed to make text easier to read while keeping the vanilla style. It replaces the default Minecraft font with a smoother and more readable version while staying lightweight and compatible with modern Minecraft versions.

NOTE: Versions Above 1.2 Do Not Contain Transparent GUI or Windows Emoji's.
